response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and distributed systems experience with exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, but lacks direct executive leadership in agentic AI or fintech. His background in event-driven systems and real-time data aligns partially with the role's technical demands, though his experience is more hands-on than strategic.
strengths: Proven expertise in event-driven architectures and distributed systems, relevant to multi-agent frameworks.
Hands-on experience with AI-agent tooling (e.g., MCP code generators) and developer infrastructure.
Diverse technical background spanning fintech-adjacent domains (e.g., real-time data, microservices).
concerns: No explicit executive leadership experience scaling teams to 30+ engineers or owning CTO-level responsibilities.
Limited demonstrated experience with agentic AI in regulated fintech environments (e.g., credit risk, compliance).
Career focus appears more on individual contribution than architectural governance or hybrid engineering models.
